label: NusA
note: E. coli K-12 NusA (N-utilization substance protein A), 495 aa, UniProt P0AFF6. Essential transcription elongation factor that enhances transcriptional pausing and intrinsic termination; displaced from RNAP by sigma at initiation. Multi-domain architecture: NTD (aa 1–137, interacts with RNAP beta-flap tip helix), S1 RNA-binding domain, KH RNA-binding domain, AR1 (interacts with bacteriophage lambda N antiterminator), AR2 (autoinhibitory). Also widely deployed as an N-terminal solubility-enhancing fusion tag in recombinant protein expression.

provenance.sequence_source: UniProt:P0AFF6 (NUSA_ECOLI, Swiss-Prot reviewed, E. coli K12 NusA, 495 aa), independently fetched via both FASTA and JSON REST endpoints — sequences identical, 100% match over full 495 aa

functional_claims.label: NusA binds RNAP core enzyme and stimulates transcriptional pausing and intrinsic (Rho-independent) termination

value.mechanism: stimulates transcriptional pausing and intrinsic termination
value.displacement: sigma factor displaced upon transition from initiation to elongation

source.quote: Interaction of the sigma factor and the nusA gene protein of E. coli with RNA polymerase in the initiation-termination cycle of transcription

functional_claims.label: NusA fused N-terminally to poorly soluble recombinant proteins markedly increases their solubility and yield in E. coli expression

source.quote: The solubility and stability of recombinant proteins are increased by their fusion to NusA

functional_claims.label: NusA acts as a passive holdase — it prevents aggregation of the fused partner during synthesis but does not actively refold misfolded partners

value.comparison: similar mode of action to MBP

source.quote: Solubility-enhancing proteins MBP and NusA play a passive role in the folding of their fusion partners

functional_claims.label: The NusA NTD (aa 1–137) is necessary and sufficient for pausing enhancement via interaction with the RNAP beta-flap tip helix / RNA exit channel

value.binding_site_on_RNAP: beta-flap tip helix / RNA exit channel

source.quote: The NusA N-terminal domain is necessary and sufficient for enhancement of transcriptional pausing via interaction with the RNA exit channel of RNA polymerase

functional_claims.label: Above 45 degrees C NusA forms high-molecular-weight oligomers via its C-terminal AR domain and acquires holdase/chaperone activity

source.quote: NusA: heat-induced oligomerization and chaperone activity

functional_claims.label: NusA-His6 double-tagged fusions can be purified by two-step IMAC exploiting NusA as a solubility partner and His6 for capture

source.quote: Two-step metal affinity purification of double-tagged (NusA-His6) fusion proteins

functional_claims.label: NusA contains NTD, S1, KH, AR1, and AR2 domains; AR1 contacts lambda N antiterminator; AR2 is autoinhibitory and regulates activity

value.regulation: AR2 autoinhibitory; AR1+AR2 form acidic repeat region

source.quote: Comprehensive review of NusA domain architecture (NTD, SKK, AR1, AR2); AR1 contacts lambda N; AR2 autoinhibitory; NusA-NusG regulation; domain residue boundaries
